markdownRemark.excerpt: Assalāmu ʿalaykum wa raḥmatullāhi wa barakātuhu, Insha’ Allāh we will be having a Fundraising BBQ & Book Sale on March 27th – 29th at the Maktabah As-Ṣaḥāba…
markdownRemark.html:
Assalāmu ʿalaykum wa raḥmatullāhi wa barakātuhu,

Insha’ Allāh we will be having a Fundraising BBQ & Book Sale on March 27th – 29th at the Maktabah As-Ṣaḥāba (254 Carleton Avenue):

Friday: 5pm – 10pm Saturday: 2pm – 10pm Sunday (Sisters Only): 1pm – 5pm

Please see attached flyer.
